    Creates a complete form definition for an entity that uses @DynamicFormField to mark its input fields.

    DynamicModelHelper.getFormDefinitionOfModelClass(Class<?> modelClass)
    Creates a complete form definition from a model class, including both field descriptors and class-level constraints.
